AlertDefinition.n: APC UPS - Low Battery / On Battery Power
AlertDefinition.Description: Alerts when an APC UPS reports a low battery or fault condition. Monitors APC Battery Status OID 1.3.6.1.4.1.318.1.1.1.2.1.1.0. Values: 1=Unknown, 2=Normal, 3=Low Battery, 4=Fault.

Parameter.Value: HIGH: UPS Low Battery / Fault Condition - ${NodeName}
